strPledgeAdd.description: Pledge added when this interaction executes. Refers to entry within pledges.json.

strPledgeRemove.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp; preserved in case mods, future updates, or older docs reference it.] Was hypothesized as a pledge-removal counterpart to strPledgeAdd; the C# class only declares strPledgeAdd / strPledgeAddThem. If you need to remove a pledge in an interaction, look for another mechanism (e.g. CTTest* + condition-based removal). Refers to entry within pledges.json.

pledge.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp; preserved as wiki convention.] Wiki documents this as 'The pledge from pledges.json related to this interaction, if any; null if none' but the C# class has only strPledgeAdd / strPledgeAddThem. Refers to entry within pledges.json.

strLootCTsGive.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot [us] gives [them] when this interaction happens, defined as CT/trigger type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootCTsLacks.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot [us] must lack when this interaction happens, defined as CT/trigger type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootCTsRemoveUs.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot to remove from [us] when this interaction happens, defined as CT/trigger type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootCTsTake.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot [them] gives [us] when this interaction happens, defined as CT/trigger type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootCTsUse.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot [us] uses when this interaction happens, defined as CT/trigger type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootItmAddUs.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot items to add to [us] when this interaction happens, defined as item type entry loot names found in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootItmAddThem.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot items to add to [them] when this interaction happens, defined as item type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootItmInputs.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot [them] requires in their Lot before this interaction happens, defined as item type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootItmRemoveThem.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: Loot items to add (sic — wiki text says 'add', but field name suggests remove) to [them] when this interaction happens, defined as item type entry in loot.json or loot_self_reference.json. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootRELChangeUs.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: relationship changes to apply to [us] when this interaction executes. Refers to entry within loot.json.

strLootRELChangeThem.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: relationship changes to apply to [them] when this interaction executes. Refers to entry within loot.json.

bDestroyItem.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: If true, [us] will destroy items after they are removed. false drops on ground.

bGetItemBefore.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: If true, this will end social combat and sub UIs. (Note: wiki description appears copy-pasted from bCloser; field semantics unclear.)

bGiveWholeStack.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: If true, Give commands will operate on whole stack when removing COs.

bRemoveWholeStack.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: If true, Remove commands will operate on whole stack when removing COs.

bVerboseTrigger.description: [GHOST: not deserialized by JsonInteraction in current decomp.] Wiki: If true, will add log messages about why this didn't trigger.
